encounters.name: Pack of Wolves
encounters.description: A hungry wolf pack emerges from the dense foliage, eyes gleaming with predatory intent.

encounters.name: Traveling Merchant
encounters.description: A weary merchant struggles along the road with his cart, seeking directions.

encounters.name: Fey Trickster
encounters.description: A mischievous fey spirit manifests before you, speaking in riddles and demanding a contest of wits.

encounters.name: Corrupted Remnant
encounters.description: A twisted humanoid creature writhes in pain, corrupted by ancient magic or void energy.

encounters.name: Lost Adventurer
encounters.description: A desperate adventurer stumbles towards you, bleeding and disoriented, begging for help.

encounters.name: Mountain Bandits
encounters.description: A group of ruthless bandits blocks the mountain pass, demanding tribute.

encounters.name: Wise Hermit
encounters.description: An old hermit sits before a small shrine, offering cryptic wisdom to travelers.

encounters.name: Avalanche Warning
encounters.description: The mountain rumbles ominously. Snow and rocks cascade down the slope!

encounters.name: Ancient Drake
encounters.description: The sky darkens as enormous wings unfold. An ancient dragon circles overhead!

encounters.name: Town Guard
encounters.description: Armed town guards approach, asking about your business in town.

encounters.name: Lost Child
encounters.description: A young child cries out, having become separated from their parents.

encounters.name: Local Festival
encounters.description: The town is celebrating a local festival! Music fills the air.

encounters.name: Hired Assassin
encounters.description: A shadowy figure steps from the darkness, blade drawn. You've been marked.

encounters.name: Restless Spirit
encounters.description: A ghostly apparition materializes, its anguished cry echoing through the ruins.

encounters.name: Trapped Explorer
encounters.description: A desperate explorer is pinned under rubble, calling for aid.

encounters.name: Ancient Artifact Gleam
encounters.description: A mysterious object glints beneath the dust and stone. Could it be a relic?

encounters.name: Void Marauder
encounters.description: Reality warps as a void entity tears through the fabric of existence itself!

encounters.name: Demon of the Abyss
encounters.description: A demonic entity emerges from a tear in reality, wreathed in void flames.

encounters.name: Corruption Wave
encounters.description: The very ground beneath your feet pulses with corrupting energy!

encounters.name: Lost Soul
encounters.description: A tormented soul pleads with you in a language you somehow understand.

encounters.name: Alpha the Bound
encounters.description: A young girl sits alone in the void, chained by incomprehensible magic. Her eyes are ancient.

forge-summit.name: Secret Mine
forge-summit.description: A hidden mine shaft concealed behind ancient dwarven masonry.

forge-summit.name: Master's Smithy
forge-summit.description: A legendary forge where master artifacts were once created.

thornwood-depths.name: Hermit's Cave
thornwood-depths.description: A secluded cave where a mysterious hermit keeps ancient knowledge.

thornwood-depths.name: Ancient Grove
thornwood-depths.description: A primordial forest sanctuary surrounded by towering ancient trees.

moonwell-shrine.name: Moon Vault
moonwell-shrine.description: A celestial vault hidden beneath the shrine, humming with lunar magic.

moonwell-shrine.name: Celestial Sanctum
moonwell-shrine.description: A sacred chamber where the moons' influence is strongest.

eldergrove-village.name: Refugee Cellar
eldergrove-village.description: A hidden cellar used by the village to shelter those in need.

eldergrove-village.name: Hidden Shrine
eldergrove-village.description: An ancient shrine predating the current settlement.
